en: There were some present at that very time who told him about the Galileans whose blood Pilate had mingled with their sacrifices.
zh: 就在那時候，有幾個在那裡的人，把加利利人的事告訴耶穌，就是彼拉多把他們的血和他們的祭物攙在一起的事。

en: And he answered them, "Do you think that these Galileans were worse sinners than all the other Galileans, because they suffered in this way?
zh: 他回答：“你們以為這些加利利人比其他的加利利人更有罪，才這樣受害嗎？

en: No, I tell you; but unless you repent, you will all likewise perish.
zh: 不是的，我告訴你們，你們若不悔改，都要這樣滅亡。

en: Or those eighteen on whom the tower in Siloam fell and killed them: do you think that they were worse offenders than all the others who lived in Jerusalem?
zh: 你們以為從前西羅亞樓倒塌的時候，壓死的那十八個人，比一切在耶路撒冷的居民更有罪嗎？

en: No, I tell you; but unless you repent, you will all likewise perish."
zh: 不是的，我告訴你們，你們若不悔改，也都要這樣滅亡。”

en: And he told this parable: "A man had a fig tree planted in his vineyard, and he came seeking fruit on it and found none.
zh: 耶穌講了這樣一個比喻：“有一個人把一棵無花果樹栽在自己的葡萄園裡。他來到樹那裡找果子，卻找不到。

en: And he said to the vinedresser, 'Look, for three years now I have come seeking fruit on this fig tree, and I find none. Cut it down. Why should it use up the ground?'
zh: 他對管園的說：‘你看，這三年，我來到這棵無花果樹那裡找果子，卻找不到，把它砍了吧！何必白佔地土呢？’

en: And he answered him, 'Sir, let it alone this year also, until I dig around it and put on manure.
zh: 管園的說：‘主人，今年且留著它，等我把周圍的泥土挖鬆，加上肥料；

en: Then if it should bear fruit next year, well and good; but if not, you can cut it down.'"
zh: 以後結果子就罷，不然，再把它砍了。’”

en: Now he was teaching in one of the synagogues on the Sabbath.
zh: 安息日的時候，耶穌在會堂裡教導人。

en: And there was a woman who had had a disabling spirit for eighteen years. She was bent over and could not fully straighten herself.
zh: 有一個女人被邪靈附著，病了十八年，彎腰曲背，完全直不起來。

en: When Jesus saw her, he called her over and said to her, "Woman, you are freed from your disability."
zh: 耶穌看見了，就叫她過來，對她說：“婦人，你脫離這疾病了。”

en: And he laid his hands on her, and immediately she was made straight, and she glorified God.
zh: 耶穌用雙手按在她身上，她立刻直起腰來，頌讚 神。

en: But the ruler of the synagogue, indignant because Jesus had healed on the Sabbath, said to the people, "There are six days in which work ought to be done. Come on those days and be healed, and not on the Sabbath day."
zh: 會堂的主管，因為耶穌在安息日治病，就氣忿忿地對群眾說：“有六天是應當作工的，你們可以在這六天裡來求醫，但在安息日卻不可以。”

en: Then the Lord answered him, "You hypocrites! Does not each of you on the Sabbath untie his ox or his donkey from the manger and lead it away to water it?
zh: 主說：“偽君子啊，你們哪一個人在安息日，不從槽那裡解開牛、驢，牽去喝水呢？

en: And ought not this woman, a daughter of Abraham whom Satan bound for eighteen years, be loosed from this bond on the Sabbath day?"
zh: 何況這個女人是亞伯拉罕的後裔，已經被撒但捆綁了十八年，不應當在安息日解開她的捆綁嗎？”

en: As he said these things, all his adversaries were put to shame, and all the people rejoiced at all the glorious things that were done by him.
zh: 他說完了這些話，那些與他為敵的人都慚愧；群眾卻都因他所行一切榮耀的事歡喜。

en: He said therefore, "What is the kingdom of God like? And to what shall I compare it?
zh: 耶穌說：“ 神的國好像甚麼呢？我要把它比作甚麼呢？

en: It is like a grain of mustard seed that a man took and sowed in his garden, and it grew and became a tree, and the birds of the air made nests in its branches."
zh: 它好像一粒芥菜種，人拿去種在自己的園子裡。它長大了，成為一棵樹，甚至天空的飛鳥也在它的枝頭搭窩。”

en: And again he said, "To what shall I compare the kingdom of God?
zh: 他又說：“我要把 神的國比作甚麼呢？

en: It is like leaven that a woman took and hid in three measures of flour, until it was all leavened."
zh: 它好像麵酵，女人拿去放在三斗麵裡，直到全團發起來。”

en: He went on his way through towns and villages, teaching and journeying toward Jerusalem.
zh: 耶穌經過各城各鄉，往耶路撒冷去，沿途教導人。

en: And someone said to him, "Lord, will those who are saved be few?" And he said to them,
zh: 有一個人問他：“主啊，是不是只有很少的人得救呢？”他對眾人說：

en: "Strive to enter through the narrow door. For many, I tell you, will seek to enter and will not be able.
zh: “你們應當竭力進窄門！我告訴你們，將來許多人要進去，卻是不能。

en: When once the master of the house has risen and shut the door, and you begin to stand outside and to knock at the door, saying, 'Lord, open to us,' then he will answer you, 'I do not know where you come from.'
zh: 等到家主起來關上門，你們站在門外叩門說：‘主啊，給我們開門！’他要回答你們：‘我不知道你們是從哪裡來的。’

en: Then you will begin to say, 'We ate and drank in your presence, and you taught in our streets.'
zh: 那時，你們要說：‘我們在你面前吃過喝過，你也在我們街上教導過人。’

en: But he will say, 'I tell you, I do not know where you come from. Depart from me, all you workers of evil!'
zh: 他要說：‘我告訴你們，我不曉得你們是從哪裡來的；你們所有作惡的人，離開我去吧！’

en: In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth, when you see Abraham and Isaac and Jacob and all the prophets in the kingdom of God but you yourselves cast out.
zh: 當你們看見亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各和眾先知都在 神的國裡的時候，你們卻被趕到外面去，在那裡必要哀哭切齒。

en: And people will come from east and west, and from north and south, and recline at table in the kingdom of God.
zh: 從東從南，從西從北，將有人來，在 神的國裡吃飯。

en: And behold, some are last who will be first, and some are first who will be last."
zh: 在後的將要在前，在前的將要在後。”

en: At that very hour some Pharisees came and said to him, "Get away from here, for Herod wants to kill you."
zh: 就在那時候，有幾個法利賽人來對耶穌說：“你離開這裡走吧！因為希律想要殺你。”

en: And he said to them, "Go and tell that fox, 'Behold, I cast out demons and perform cures today and tomorrow, and the third day I finish my course.
zh: 他說：“你們去告訴那個狐狸，今天明天我趕鬼醫病，第三天我的事就完成了。

en: Nevertheless, I must go on my way today and tomorrow and the day following, for it cannot be that a prophet should perish away from Jerusalem.'
zh: 然而，今天明天後天，我必須前行，因為先知不能在耶路撒冷以外喪命。

en: O Jerusalem, Jerusalem, the city that kills the prophets and stones those who are sent to it! How often would I have gathered your children together as a hen gathers her brood under her wings, and you would not!
zh: 耶路撒冷啊，耶路撒冷，你殺害先知，又用石頭把奉派到你那裡的人打死。我多次想招聚你的兒女，好像母雞招聚小雞到翅膀底下，只是你們不願意。

en: Behold, your house is forsaken. And I tell you, you will not see me until you say, 'Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord!'"
zh: 你看，你們的家必成為荒場留給你們。我告訴你們，從今以後，你們一定見不到我，直等到你們說：‘奉主名來的，是應當稱頌的。’”
